title: スタンプカードの対象明細

cases.name: キャンペーン加算と通常購入が混ざる

input.factory: () => ({ purchases: [{ code: "A-100", price: 120, count: 2 }, { code: "S-050", price: 80, count: 3 }, { code: "B-020", price: 300, count: 1 }], card: { prefix: "GOLD", campaignPrefix: "S-", bonus: 20, minimum: 250, score(purchase) { let value = purchase.price * purchase.count; if (purchase.code.startsWith(this.campaignPrefix)) { value += this.bonus; } return value; }, isRewardTarget(purchase) { return this.score(purchase) >= this.minimum; }, label(purchase, index) { return this.prefix + "#" + (index + 1) + ":" + purchase.code + "=" + this.score(purchase); } } })

cases.name: しきい値ちょうどと元のインデックス

input.factory: () => ({ purchases: [{ code: "N-1", price: 100, count: 1 }, { code: "SALE-2", price: 85, count: 2 }, { code: "N-3", price: 199, count: 1 }, { code: "N-4", price: 200, count: 1 }], card: { prefix: "BLUE", campaignPrefix: "SALE", bonus: 30, minimum: 200, score(purchase) { let value = purchase.price * purchase.count; if (purchase.code.startsWith(this.campaignPrefix)) { value += this.bonus; } return value; }, isRewardTarget(purchase) { return this.score(purchase) >= this.minimum; }, label(purchase, index) { return this.prefix + "#" + (index + 1) + ":" + purchase.code + "=" + this.score(purchase); } } })

() => ({ purchases: [{ code: "S-1", price: 60, count: 2 }, { code: "N-2", price: 90, count: 1 }], card: { prefix: "RED", campaignPrefix: "S-", bonus: 10, minimum: 200, score(purchase) { let value = purchase.price * purchase.count; if (purchase.code.startsWith(this.campaignPrefix)) { value += this.bonus; } return value; }, isRewardTarget(purchase) { return this.score(purchase) >= this.minimum; }, label(purchase, index) { return this.prefix + "#" + (index + 1) + ":" + purchase.code + "=" + this.score(purchase); } } })

() => ({ purchases: [], card: { prefix: "EMPTY", campaignPrefix: "E-", bonus: 50, minimum: 100, score(purchase) { let value = purchase.price * purchase.count; if (purchase.code.startsWith(this.campaignPrefix)) { value += this.bonus; } return value; }, isRewardTarget(purchase) { return this.score(purchase) >= this.minimum; }, label(purchase, index) { return this.prefix + "#" + (index + 1) + ":" + purchase.code + "=" + this.score(purchase); } } })

() => ({ purchases: [{ code: "P-1", price: 30, count: 1 }, { code: "Q-2", price: 50, count: 2 }], card: { prefix: "BLACK", campaignPrefix: "P-", bonus: 100, minimum: 100, score(purchase) { let value = purchase.price * purchase.count; if (purchase.code.startsWith(this.campaignPrefix)) { value += this.bonus; } return value; }, isRewardTarget(purchase) { return this.score(purchase) >= this.minimum; }, label(purchase, index) { return this.prefix + "#" + (index + 1) + ":" + purchase.code + "=" + this.score(purchase); } } })
